# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.

##########################
# Public Health (always-available free tree)
##########################

sanitation_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism

	global_life_expectancy = 4
	global_disease_resistance = 0.07

	depth = 0
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

##########################
# Manufactories
##########################

manufactories_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism
		
	global_max_rgo_size_modifier = 0.10
	depth = 0
	
	allow = { has_embraced_institution = institution:manufactories }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

central_bank_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism

	unlock_building = central_bank
	max_bonds = 5

	allow = {
		has_embraced_institution = institution:banking
	}

	requires = manufactories_advance

	ai_weight = { add = 100 }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}


lead_ore_dressing = {
	age = age_5_absolutism
	icon = serbian_mining
	
	requires = manufactories_advance
	
	global_lead_output_modifier = 1.0
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

	age = age_5_absolutism
	icon = zmw_merchant_taxes
	
	requires = manufactories_advance
	
	global_copper_output_modifier = 0.25
	global_tin_output_modifier = 0.1
	global_stone_output_modifier = 0.1
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

}

	age = age_5_absolutism
	icon = diplomatic_influence
	requires = town_rights_abs_advance
	power_projection = 5
	num_local_governors = 1

	# add extra score because num_local_governors is hard to register in code
	ai_weight = { add = 200 }
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}
